author: RAC
name: 9L MLP3x LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 + QAT Int6 + zstd + Sliding Window Eval
blurb: 9-layer 512dim with 3x MLP expansion (hidden=1536), LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 activation, int6 QAT with STE fake-quantize, zstd-22 compression, fp16 embedding passthrough, and sliding window evaluation (stride=64). Post-quant int6+zstd roundtrip under the 16,000,000-byte cap.
